---
title: "Covid Draft 2"
author: "Tony Carilli"
date: "12/11/2020"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, options(scipen = 999), digits = 3)
library(tidyverse)
# library(lmtest)
library(gt)
```

# Data

```{r data}
df <- 
  here::here("data", "covid_data_final.csv") %>% 
  read_csv() 
```




# Base Model

$$\mathit{New Cases} = \beta_0 + \beta_1\mathit{Stringency} + \beta_2\mathit{Sringency*SocialCapital + \sum\gamma_i\mathit{X_i}} + \epsilon $$
# base model 

## effect = time

### with controls

```{r base-model-index-control}
df %>% 
  plm::plm(
    cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * state_level_dummy +
      median_household_income + 
      percent_adults_with_ba + 
      percent_in_fair_or_poor_health +
      percent_black + 
      density + 
      percent_rural +
      percent_65 + 
      average_temperature + 
      governor_political_affiliation,
    data = .,
    effect = "time",
    index = "state",
    model = "within"
  ) %>% 
  summary()
```


### testing iv's

```{r testing-ivs}
df %>%
  filter(date == "2020-03-01") %>%
  lm(
    state_level_dummy ~  median_household_income +
      percent_adults_with_ba +
      percent_in_fair_or_poor_health +
      percent_black +
      density +
      percent_rural +
      percent_65 +
      average_temperature +
      governor_political_affiliation,
    data = .
  ) %>% 
  broom::glance()

```

###  with controls as iv

```{r base-model-iv-approach}
df %>%
  plm::plm(
    cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * state_level_dummy |
      stringency_index_lag + stringency_index_lag:state_level_dummy +
      median_household_income +
      percent_adults_with_ba +
      percent_in_fair_or_poor_health +
      percent_black +
      density +
      percent_rural +
      percent_65 +
      average_temperature +
      governor_political_affiliation,
    data = .,
    effect = "time",
    index = "state",
    model = "within"
  ) %>%
  summary()
  # lmtest::coeftest(vcov. = vcovHC(. ,method = "white1", cluster = "group", type = "sss"))
```

### robust se

```{r base-robust-se}
# model <- 
df %>%
  plm::plm(
    cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * state_level_dummy +
    median_household_income + 
      percent_adults_with_ba + 
      percent_in_fair_or_poor_health +
      percent_black + 
      density + 
      percent_rural +
      percent_65 + 
      average_temperature + 
      governor_political_affiliation,
    data = .,
    effect = "time",
    index = "state",
    model = "within"
  ) %>% 
  # summary() #%>% 
  lmtest::coeftest(vcov. = vcovHC(. ,method = "white1", cluster = "group", type = "sss"))
```



## effect = twoways

### with controls

```{r}
df %>% 
  filter(date >= "2020-09-01" & date <= "2020-11-30") %>% 
  plm::plm(
    cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * state_level_dummy + 
      I(stringency_index_lag^2), # +
      # median_household_income + 
      # percent_adults_with_ba + 
      # percent_in_fair_or_poor_health +
      # percent_black + 
      # density + 
      # percent_rural +
      # percent_65 + 
      # average_temperature + 
      # governor_political_affiliation,
    data = .,
    effect = "twoways",
    index = "state",
    model = "within"
  ) %>% 
  summary()
```


### with controls as iv

```{r base-model-iv-approach-twoways}
df %>%
  plm::plm(
    cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * state_level_dummy |
      stringency_index_lag + stringency_index_lag:state_level_dummy +
      median_household_income +
      percent_adults_with_ba +
      percent_in_fair_or_poor_health +
      percent_black +
      density +
      percent_rural +
      percent_65 +
      average_temperature +
      governor_political_affiliation,
    data = .,
    effect = "twoways",
    index = "state",
    model = "within"
  ) %>%
  summary()
  # lmtest::coeftest(vcov. = vcovHC(. ,method = "white1", cluster = "group", type = "sss"))
```




# many 

## setup

```{r social-capital-models-setup}
models <- list()

model_names <- c(
  "state",
  "family_unity",
  "family_interaction",
  "social_support",
  "community_health",
  "institutional_health",
  "collective_efficacy",
  "philanthropic_health",
  "trust_neighbor",
  "penn_state",
  "putnam_index",
  "ferrara",
  "family_prosperity"
)

social_capital <- c(
  "state_level_dummy",
  "family_unity_dummy",
  "family_interaction_dummy",
  "social_support_dummy",
  "community_health_dummy",
  "institutional_health_dummy",
  "collective_efficacy_dummy",
  "philanthropic_health_dummy",
  "neighbor_dummy",
  "putnam_index",
  "scp_version_of_penn_state_index",
  "alesina_la_ferrara_social_capital_group",
  "family_prosperity_index"
)

controls <- c(
  "median_household_income",
  "percent_adults_with_ba",
  "percent_in_fair_or_poor_health",
  "percent_black",
  "density",
  "percent_rural",
  "percent_65",
  "average_temperature",
  "governor_political_affiliation"
)

```


## controls only

### effect = time

```{r many-models-controls-effect-time}

for (i in seq_along(social_capital)) {
  models[[i]] <-
    glue::glue(
      'cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * ',
      social_capital[i],
      ' + ',
      glue::glue_collapse(controls, " + ")
    )
}

model_frame <- tibble(model = models) %>% 
  mutate(model_name = names(model))

model_frame <- model_frame %>% 
  mutate(model = map(model, as.formula))

estimated_models <- 
  model_frame %>% 
  mutate(fit = map(model, ~plm::plm(., data = df, effect = "time", index = "state", model = "within")))

models_tidy <- 
  estimated_models %>% 
  transmute(model_names, betas = purrr::map(fit, broom::tidy))

models_glanced <- 
  estimated_models %>% 
  transmute(model_names, stats = purrr::map(fit, broom::glance))

# estimated_models$fit %>% 
#   purrr::map_df(broom::tidy) %>% 
#   mutate(model = rep(names(models), each = 12), .before = "term") %>% 
#   pivot_longer(cols = 3:6,
#                names_to = "estimate",
#                values_to = "value")
#   
# 
# estimated_models$fit %>% 
#   purrr::map_df(broom::tidy) %>% 
#   mutate(model = rep(names(models), each = 12), .before = "term") %>% 
#   pivot_wider(names_from = model)

models_tidy %>% 
  unnest_wider(betas) %>% 
  # unnest_longer(term) %>% 
  unnest_wider(estimate, names_sep = "_") %>% 
  unnest_wider(std.error, names_sep = "_") %>% 
  select(model_names, ends_with(c("_1", "_2", "_12")))
```


### effect = twoways

```{r many-models-controls-effect-twoways}
for (i in seq_along(social_capital)) {
  models[[i]] <-
    glue::glue(
      'cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * ',
      social_capital[i]
    )
}

model_frame <- tibble(model = models) %>% 
  mutate(model_name = names(model))

model_frame <- model_frame %>% 
  mutate(model = map(model, as.formula))

estimated_models <- 
  model_frame %>% 
  mutate(fit = map(model, ~plm::plm(., data = df, effect = "twoways", index = "state", model = "within")))

models_tidy <- 
  estimated_models %>% 
  transmute(model_names, betas = purrr::map(fit, broom::tidy))

models_glanced <- 
  estimated_models %>% 
  transmute(model_names, stats = purrr::map(fit, broom::glance))


# estimated_models$fit %>% 
#   purrr::map_df(broom::tidy) %>% 
#   mutate(model = rep(names(models), each = 2), .before = "term") %>% 
#   pivot_longer(cols = 3:6,
#                names_to = "estimate",
#                values_to = "value")
#   
# 
# estimated_models$fit %>% 
#   purrr::map_df(broom::tidy) %>% 
#   mutate(model = rep(names(models), each = 2), .before = "term") %>% 
#   pivot_wider(names_from = model)

models_tidy %>% 
  unnest_wider(betas) %>% 
  # unnest_longer(term) %>% 
  unnest_wider(estimate, names_sep = "_") %>% 
  unnest_wider(std.error, names_sep = "_") %>% 
  select(model_names, ends_with(c("_1", "_2")))
```

#### broken by date 2-way

##### mar-may

```{r mar-may}

for (i in seq_along(social_capital)) {
  models[[i]] <-
    glue::glue(
      'cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * 
      social_capital[i] + I(stringency_index_lag^2)'
    )
}

model_frame <- tibble(model = models) %>% 
  mutate(model_name = names(model))

model_frame <- model_frame %>% 
  mutate(model = map(model, as.formula))


estimated_models <- 
  model_frame %>% 
  mutate(fit = map(model, ~plm::plm(., data = df %>% 
                                      filter(date >= "2020-03-01" & date <= "2020-05-31"),
                                    effect = "twoways", index = "state", model = "within")))

models_tidy <- 
  estimated_models %>% 
  transmute(model_names, betas = purrr::map(fit, broom::tidy))

models_glanced <- 
  estimated_models %>% 
  transmute(model_names, stats = purrr::map(fit, broom::glance))

models_tidy %>% 
  unnest_wider(betas) %>% 
  unnest_wider(estimate, names_sep = "_") %>% 
  unnest_wider(std.error, names_sep = "_") #%>% 
  # select(model_names, ends_with(c("_1", "_2")))

```

##### jun - aug

```{r jun-aug}
estimated_models <- 
  model_frame %>% 
  mutate(fit = map(model, ~plm::plm(., data = df %>% 
                                      filter(date >= "2020-06-01" & date <= "2020-08-31"),
                                    effect = "twoways", index = "state", model = "within")))

models_tidy <- 
  estimated_models %>% 
  transmute(model_names, betas = purrr::map(fit, broom::tidy))

models_glanced <- 
  estimated_models %>% 
  transmute(model_names, stats = purrr::map(fit, broom::glance))

models_tidy %>% 
  unnest_wider(betas) %>% 
  unnest_wider(estimate, names_sep = "_") %>% 
  unnest_wider(std.error, names_sep = "_") %>% 
  select(model_names, ends_with(c("_1", "_2")))
```

##### sep - nov

```{r sep-nov}
estimated_models <- 
  model_frame %>% 
  mutate(fit = map(model, ~plm::plm(., data = df %>% 
                                      filter(date >= "2020-09-01" & date <= "2020-11-30"),
                                    effect = "twoways", index = "state", model = "within")))

models_tidy <- 
  estimated_models %>% 
  transmute(model_names, betas = purrr::map(fit, broom::tidy))

models_glanced <- 
  estimated_models %>% 
  transmute(model_names, stats = purrr::map(fit, broom::glance))

models_tidy %>% 
  unnest_wider(betas) %>% 
  unnest_wider(estimate, names_sep = "_") %>% 
  unnest_wider(std.error, names_sep = "_") %>% 
  select(model_names, ends_with(c("_1", "_2")))
```


## controls as IV

### effect = time

```{r many-models-controls-as-IV-effect-time}
for (i in seq_along(social_capital)) {
  models[[i]] <-
    glue::glue(
      'cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * ',
      social_capital[i],
      ' | stringency_index_lag + ',
      social_capital[i],
      ':stringency_index_lag + ',
      glue::glue_collapse(controls, " + ")
    )
}

names(models) <- model_names

model_frame <- tibble(model = models) %>% 
  mutate(model_name = names(model))

model_frame <- model_frame %>% 
  mutate(model = map(model, as.formula))

estimated_models <- 
  model_frame %>% 
  mutate(fit = map(model, ~plm::plm(., data = df, effect = "time", index = "state", model = "within")))

models_tidy <- 
  estimated_models %>% 
  transmute(model_name, betas = purrr::map(fit, broom::tidy))


estimated_models$fit %>% 
  purrr::map_df(broom::tidy) %>% 
  mutate(model = rep(names(models), each = 3), .before = "term") %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = 3:6,
               names_to = "estimate",
               values_to = "value")
  

estimated_models$fit %>% 
  purrr::map_df(broom::tidy) %>% 
  mutate(model = rep(names(models), each = 3), .before = "term") %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = model)

models_tidy %>% 
  unnest_wider(betas) %>% 
  # unnest_longer(term) %>% 
  unnest_wider(estimate, names_sep = "_") %>% 
  unnest_wider(std.error, names_sep = "_") %>% 
  select(model_name, ends_with(c("_1", "_2", "_3")))
```

### effect = twoways

```{r many-models-controls-as-iv-effect-twoways}
estimated_models <- 
  model_frame %>% 
  mutate(fit = map(model, ~plm::plm(., data = df, effect = "twoways", index = "state", model = "within")))

models_tidy <- 
  estimated_models %>% 
  transmute(model_name, betas = purrr::map(fit, broom::tidy))


estimated_models$fit %>% 
  purrr::map_df(broom::tidy) %>% 
  mutate(model = rep(names(models), each = 2), .before = "term") %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = 3:6,
               names_to = "estimate",
               values_to = "value")
  

estimated_models$fit %>% 
  purrr::map_df(broom::tidy) %>% 
  mutate(model = rep(names(models), each = 2), .before = "term") %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = model)

models_tidy %>% 
  unnest_wider(betas) %>% 
  # unnest_longer(term) %>% 
  unnest_wider(estimate, names_sep = "_") %>% 
  unnest_wider(std.error, names_sep = "_") %>% 
  select(model_name, ends_with(c("_1", "_2")))
```





# tables
## table 1 JEC

```{r table-1}
models_tidy %>% 
  left_join(models_glanced, by = "model_names") %>% 
  unnest(c(betas, stats), names_repair = "universal") %>% 
  select(model_names, estimate, std.error, r.squared, statistic...9, p.value...10, nobs) %>% 
  rename(f_stat = statistic...9, p_val = p.value...10) %>% 
  mutate(term = rep(c("si", "interact"), times = 13), .before = estimate) %>% 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), round, 3)) %>%
  mutate(nobs = as.integer(nobs)) %>% 
  pivot_longer(-c(model_names, term),
               names_to = "measure",
               values_to = "value") %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = model_names) %>% 
  slice(1, 2, 7:12) %>% 
  mutate(measure = c(
    "Stringency Index",
    "se",
    "Stringency Index * Social Capital Index",
    "se",
    "R-sqr",
    "F",
    "p-value",
    "N"
  )
  ) %>% 
  # arrange(match(measure, c("estimate", "std.error")), term) %>% 
  gt() %>% 
  fmt_number(model_names, rows = 8, decimals = 0) %>% 
  cols_label(measure = "",
             state = "Total Social Capital",
             family_unity = "Family Unity",
             family_interaction = "Family Interaction",
             social_support = "Social Support",
             community_health = "Community Health",
             institutional_health = "Instutional Health",
             collective_efficacy = "Collective Efficacy",
             philanthropic_health = "Philanthropic Health",
             trust_neighbor = "Trust Neighbors"
  ) %>% 
  tab_spanner("Sub-Index", model_names[2:9]) %>% 
  cols_align("center") %>% 
  cols_hide(c(1, 12:15)) %>% 
  opt_table_lines("default") %>% 
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(style = "italic"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(measure),
      rows = 7:8
    )
  ) %>% 
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "Siginicant at the 1% level",
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(model_names),
      rows = c(1,3)
    )
  ) %>% 
  opt_footnote_marks(marks = c("*", "+")) %>% 
  tab_header(
    title = "Two-way Fixed Effects Results",
    subtitle = "Joint Economic Committee Social Capital Indicies")
```

## table 1 other indexes

```{r}
models_tidy %>% 
  left_join(models_glanced, by = "model_names") %>% 
  unnest(c(betas, stats), names_repair = "universal") %>% 
  select(model_names, estimate, std.error, r.squared, statistic...9, p.value...10, nobs) %>% 
  rename(f_stat = statistic...9, p_val = p.value...10) %>% 
  mutate(term = rep(c("si", "interact"), times = 13), .before = estimate) %>% 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), round, 3)) %>%
  mutate(nobs = as.integer(nobs)) %>% 
  pivot_longer(-c(model_names, term),
               names_to = "measure",
               values_to = "value") %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = model_names) %>% 
  slice(1, 2, 7:12) %>% 
  mutate(measure = c(
    "Stringency Index",
    "se",
    "Stringency Index * Social Capital Index",
    "se",
    "R-sqr",
    "F",
    "p-value",
    "N"
  )
  ) %>% 
  # arrange(match(measure, c("estimate", "std.error")), term) %>% 
  gt() %>% 
  fmt_number(model_names, rows = 8, decimals = 0) %>% 
  cols_label(measure = "",
             penn_state = "Penn State Index (SCP)",
             putnam_index = "Putnam Index",
             ferrara = "Alesina La Ferrar",
             family_prosperity = "Family Prosperity"
  ) %>% 
  # tab_spanner("Sub-Index", model_names[2:9]) %>% 
  cols_align("center") %>% 
  cols_hide(c(1, 3:11)) %>% 
  opt_table_lines("default") %>% 
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(style = "italic"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(measure),
      rows = 7:8
    )
  ) %>% 
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "Siginicant at the 1% level",
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(model_names),
      rows = c(1,3)
    )
  ) %>% 
  opt_footnote_marks(marks = c("*", "+")) %>% 
  tab_header(
    title = "Two-way Fixed Effects Results",
    subtitle = "Social Capital Indices")
```



## 


# residuals

```{r residuals}
mod_time <-
  df %>%
  plm::plm(
    cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * state_level_dummy +
      median_household_income +
      percent_adults_with_ba +
      percent_in_fair_or_poor_health +
      percent_black +
      density +
      percent_rural +
      percent_65 +
      average_temperature +
      governor_political_affiliation,
    data = .,
    effect = "time",
    index = "state",
    model = "within"
  ) 

mod_twoways <- 
  df %>%
  plm::plm(
    cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * state_level_dummy, #+
      # median_household_income +
      # percent_adults_with_ba +
      # percent_in_fair_or_poor_health +
      # percent_black +
      # density +
      # percent_rural +
      # percent_65 +
      # average_temperature +
      # governor_political_affiliation, 
    data = .,
    effect = "twoways",
    index = "state",
    model = "within"
  ) 

tibble(mod_time$residuals, mod_twoways$residuals) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = mod_time$residuals, y = mod_twoways$residuals)) + 
  geom_point() + 
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, color = "blue", size = 1.5)
```

## r squared

```{r r-squared}

mod_time %>% 
  plm::r.squared()

mod_twoways %>% 
  plm::r.squared()
```
```{r}
mod_time %>% 
  summary()

mod_twoways %>% 
  summary()
```
